# Chapter One

We can reference a theorem before stating it: @thm-main.

::: {.theorem #thm-main}
## A Main Theorem
For every real number $x$, if $x > 1$ then $x^2 > 1$.
:::

::: {.lemma #lem-support}
If $x > 1$, then $x^2 > x$.
:::

::: {.theorem #thm-second}
If $x > 2$, then $x^2 > 4$.
:::

::: {.proof}
See the pudding.
:::

The proof idea for @thm-main uses @lem-support, and @thm-second is another theorem in the same shared counter.

::: {.exercise #exr-try}
Prove @thm-main directly from the definition of order on $\mathbb{R}$.
:::

Now refer back to the exercise: @exr-try.
